name: Star Map 25 — Temporary Events
description: Global temporary events that target systems or segmentums and modify Star Map 25 rewards.

events.name: Hydraphur Revolt
events.description: A revolt threatens Hydraphur. Deploy or invade there for boosted Star Map rewards.

events.name: Solar Fortification Window
events.description: Segmentum Solar receives emergency support. Build, deploy, and invade Solar systems during the window.
